scripts.contract:compile: pnpm env:check && dotenv -f .env -- pnpm --filter @apps/contracts exec forge compile
scripts.contract:test: pnpm env:check && dotenv -f .env -- pnpm --filter @apps/contracts exec forge test
scripts.contract:cov: pnpm env:check && dotenv -f .env -- pnpm --filter @apps/contracts exec forge coverage
scripts.contract:deploy:base: pnpm env:check && dotenv -f .env -- pnpm --filter @apps/contracts exec forge script script/BioVerifyV3.s.sol:BioVerifyV3Script --rpc-url base_sepolia --broadcast --verify --target-contract BioVerifyV3
scripts.contract:deploy:sepolia: pnpm env:check && dotenv -f .env -- pnpm --filter @apps/contracts exec forge script script/BioVerifyV3.s.sol:BioVerifyV3Script --rpc-url sepolia --broadcast --verify --target-contract BioVerifyV3
